description: You are a Security Consultant or ELV Engineer. The FZK-Haus residential model has been loaded in Bonsai/BlenderBIM. Your task is to overlay a basic access control and CCTV security system onto the architectural model using the correct semantic IFC classes. Model at least two access control card readers (IfcSecurityAppliance) near the entrances, at least one CCTV camera (IfcAudioVisualAppliance) observing an entrance, and at least one alarm siren or bell (IfcAlarm). Create a new distribution system (IfcDistributionSystem) named "Access Control System" or "Security Network" and assign these security elements to it. Save the enriched project as an IFC file to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_security.ifc. Exact geometric accuracy is not required (simple cubes/cylinders are fine); the focus is on correct IFC entity typing and logical system grouping.
